PublicDescription: This event counts statistical profiling sample population, the count of all operations that could be sampled but may or may not be chosen for sampling.
This event counts statistical profiling samples taken for sampling.
This event counts statistical profiling samples taken which are not removed by filtering.
This event counts statistical profiling samples that have collided with a previous sample and so therefore not taken.
This event counts statistical profiling samples taken which are branches.
This event counts statistical profiling samples taken which are Loads or Load atomic operations.
This event counts statistical profiling samples taken which are Stores or Store atomic operations.
This event counts statistical profiling samples taken which are matching any operation type filters supported.
This event counts statistical profiling samples taken which are matching event packet filter constraints.
This event counts statistical profiling samples taken which are exceeding minimum latency set by operation latency filter constraints.
